## Meeting Purpose

[Bi-weekly all-hands meeting to review Q2 results, introduce new hires, showcase new logos, and discuss company strategy and frameworks.](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Q2 ended with $7.5M revenue run rate; strong growth but concerns about churn](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [New focus on deeper client understanding and high-quality outputs to build trust](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Impressive new logos acquired (SentinelOne, Okta, Surge AI) with potential for co-marketing](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
  - [New human-AI framework introduced to optimize delivery team roles and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)

## Topics

### Q2 Financial Results

  - [Revenue run rate: $7.5 million](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Cash balance: Over $10 million](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
  - Burn: Under $2 million (burn multiple \< 0.5)
  - [Presence in 22 countries](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Concerns about churn and retention; addressing through improved client understanding and output quality](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)

### New Client Logos

  - [High-profile additions: SentinelOne, Okta, Surge AI](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Surge AI deal: $60k/month + expenses, closed in 3 days](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Other notable clients: Outreach (sales enablement platform), Monograph (tool for architects/engineers)](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [Pipeline includes Udbe, Ambien, Roar (AI/security focused companies)](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

### Human-AI Framework

  - [Three layers: Service, AI Workflows, Human Expertise](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Three key roles in delivery team:](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=1231.0)
    1.  Process Architects: Create blueprints for workflows
    2.  Input Calibrators: Gather and process client inputs effectively
    3.  Production Refiners: Ensure high-quality outputs and raise the bar

### Strategy Sprints and Client Feedback

  - [Implementing deeper client understanding through extensive research and artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)
  - [Positive feedback on high-quality, insightful outputs (e.g., Surge AI data quality manifesto)](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [Focus on avoiding generic AI-generated content to maintain client trust](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Share detailed churn analysis document in the next two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Conduct a session on effectively using Atlas for assignments](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=1930.0)
  - [Continue to iterate on workflows to make each output cheaper, better, and faster](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [Ensure all team members understand and align with their roles in the human-AI framework](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Maintain focus on learning from every output to continuously improve processes](https://fathom.video/share/F4jZnLyhbfWizxhx5sxFoAxvy-Sb2JFn?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)
